response.justification: Candidate has strong technical breadth, solid open-source credentials (GISCollective founder), and Linux/architecture experience that align well with the role's technical scope. However, two critical gaps make this a poor fit for a Head of Development position: German proficiency is listed as 'Basic' against a hard C1 requirement, and there is no formal team leadership or management experience in the work history — all roles are individual contributor (Senior/Staff Software Engineer), not lead or head-of-team positions.
strengths: Founder of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating architecture ownership and long-term technical vision
Strong Linux/Unix and open-source background aligned with company specialization
Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, embedded with proven IT architecture skills
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' — fails the hard C1 language requirement
No formal leadership or team management role in employment history despite senior title progression
Python and UML are absent from listed skills; requirements management and compliance/risk experience not evidenced
